caller-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the Maven parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom project parent to inherit shared configuration.
Removed explicit Java version properties (source, target, java.version) as they are likely now managed by the new parent POM.
Added a SonarQube module key property to enable or configure Sonar analysis for this module.
Updated the Lombok dependency to a newer version.
Added the Hoverfly Java JUnit5 dependency for API mocking in tests.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the Maven parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom internal parent POM.
Removed explicit Java version properties, likely relying on the new parent POM or build environment for JDK 17 configuration.
Added SonarQube module key property for code quality analysis integration.
Defined a property for the Testcontainers library version to manage dependency versions centrally.
Updated Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with the target environment.
Added Testcontainers PostgreSQL dependency to enable containerized database testing.
Added Testcontainers JUnit Jupiter integration dependency for test lifecycle management.
Added Instancio JUnit dependency for generating test data objects.
Added Testcontainers BOM to dependency management to align versions of Testcontainers modules.

pom.xml.general_idea: Inherit from spring-boot-starter-parent to manage dependencies and plugin versions.
Update the target Java version from 15 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Add SonarCloud configuration properties for code quality analysis.

k8s/liquibase-cm-v2.yaml.general_idea: Corrected ALTER TABLE statements by adding the missing table name 'person' to ensure valid SQL syntax.
k8s/liquibase-cm-v2.yaml.human_impl: alter table person rename column firstname to first_name;

k8s/liquibase-job-v1.yaml.general_idea: Replace the generic Liquibase container image with a custom project-specific image.

k8s/liquibase-job-v2.yaml.general_idea: Switch the Liquibase container image to a custom build likely containing Java 17 dependencies.
Move database password from plain text to a Kubernetes Secret reference for security.
